problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
hypothesis: If Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
